steps_completed.task: Audit existing docs/openapi.yaml paths against backend router to identify missing endpoints, incorrect methods, or stale path definitions
steps_completed.findings: All 21 backend router endpoints matched spec paths. No missing or stale endpoints. Found status query param on /v1/markets missing closed and draft values.

steps_completed.task: Compare existing schema components against types.ts and backend response handlers to identify missing or outdated fields
steps_completed.findings: Found 8 discrepancies: MarketSummary missing expires_at and incomplete status enum; Market incomplete status enum; ExposurePosition lastOrderId/lastCommandId not nullable; ProbabilityEditResponse/EventTradeResponse missing result field; CommandAcceptedResponse had wrong shape for resolve endpoint; EngineStatsResponse clique items unstructured; command responses missing CommandResponseMeta with idempotencyKeyEcho/replayed.

steps_completed.task: Update path definitions: fix status query param enum on /v1/markets, fix resolve endpoint 201 response schema

Update component schemas: add expires_at to MarketSummary, fix status enums, make ExposurePosition fields nullable, add result+CommandResponseMeta to order responses, replace CommandAcceptedResponse with TerminalResult+CommandResponseMeta, add structured CliqueSummary items
Validate final spec: all 127 $ref targets resolve, required fields match properties, new schemas present, old CommandAcceptedResponse removed
